text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the Sprinters Stakes approaches, our final
preparations begin with our senior-year summer
camp! As for Bamboo Memory...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! It feels good to be back! Oh yeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Trainer! I want this year's training camp to
be ten billion times tougher than last year! Let's
blow past my limits!
choice_data_list: I can't promise ten billion, but it won't be easy!
I can't promise ten billion, but it won't be easy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, our most intense summer camp yet
begins!
